company_name: Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V.
description: Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. operates as a direct-to-consumer selling company in the United States and Mexico. It operates through Home Organization Products; and Beauty and Personal Care Products segments. The Home Organization Products segment provides a portfolio of products comprising kitchen and food preservation; home solutions; bedroom; bathroom; laundry and cleaning; wellness; and technology and mobility. The Beauty and Personal Care Products segment offers fragrances, color, skin care products, and toiletries. It sells its products through catalogues, as well as distributes
